purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Logging polish and monitoring polish completed. Mini Support Desk works through web -> app, product logs are visible in Loki/Grafana, app product metrics are scraped by Prometheus, Grafana dashboard shows supportdesk-api health/tickets/active alerts, and alert rules are implemented and tested. Roadmap expanded toward production-like evolution with Admin/Ansible foundation, product model v2, resource/category metrics and alerts, HTTP error-rate metrics, Dockerization, PostgreSQL, DB observability/backups, Telegram bot, hardening, Ansible automation v2, and final README/demo packaging.
last_completed_stage: Monitoring polish: app /metrics scrape added, SupportDesk Tickets and SupportDesk API UP panels added, Active Alerts panel added, alerts SupportDeskApiDown, TooManyOpenTickets, HighDiskUsage and NodeTargetDown created and tested
current_next_stage: Admin/Ansible foundation: SSH keys to all nodes, full inventory, ansible all ping, Git repo, control-node structure, first operational playbooks
progress_estimate: expanded roadmap formal progress 10/21 stages completed (~48%); core infrastructure lab stages 1-10 completed; engineering readiness for expanded production-like scope 52-58%; current core demo readiness 80-85%
